entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop used for beer production in Kenya

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: The country where the study takes place

entities.name: EXCISE DUTY
entities.description: A tax imposed by the government on sorghum beer

entities.name: VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The sequence of processes involved in producing sorghum beer

entities.name: SMALLHOLDERS
entities.description: Small-scale farmers involved in the sorghum value chain

entities.name: BREWERY
entities.description: The entity processing sorghum into beer

entities.name: COMPLEX ADAPTIVE SYSTEMS
entities.description: The conceptual framework used to analyze the value chain

entities.name: ENDOGENOUS SHOCKS
entities.description: Sudden internal disruptions within the system

entities.name: INTERACTING AGENTS
entities.description: Entities within the system that influence each other

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting to changes or shocks

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMER ORGANIZATIONS
entities.description: Groups of smallholders that facilitate adaptation

entities.name: NEO-PATRIMONIAL STATES
entities.description: Political systems characterized by a blend of formal and informal power structures

relationships.description: Sorghum is the primary crop of the beer value chain
The value chain is located in Kenya
Excise duty imposed by the government negatively impacted the value chain
Smallholders are key actors in the value chain
The brewery is a key actor in the value chain
Used as a framework to analyze the value chain
Endogenous shocks are a property of complex adaptive systems
Interacting agents are a property of complex adaptive systems
Adaptation is a property of complex adaptive systems
Smallholder farmer organizations were important for successful adaptation
Neo-patrimonial states create complexity and uncertainty in value chains
Excise duty caused economic losses for smallholders
Excise duty caused economic losses for the brewery
